question.label: Thread follow
question.name: name wins, always — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.

assessment.note: He says feedback is useful but names a specific recurring failure mode—losing consistency under time pressure—which confirms a strong clarity gap while staying engaged with improving.

new_queue.label: Time pressure consistency
new_queue.name: Under time pressure, what specifically starts to slip in your work?

new_queue.label: Recent example
new_queue.name: What is one recent piece of your brand work that best shows your current quality bar?

new_queue.label: Feedback in practice
new_queue.name: What changed in your day-to-day work after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Missed signal
new_queue.name: Where do you think your work most often misses the mark?

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is the main thing that is slowing your growth right now?

new_queue.label: Practice focus
new_queue.name: What one design habit do you want to practice over the next few weeks?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help you make that practice stick this month?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
